name: Atlas Air Worldwide Holdings, Inc.
description: Atlas Air Worldwide Holdings, Inc. is a leading global provider of outsourced aircraft and aviation operating services. It is the parent company of Atlas Air, Inc. and Polar Air Cargo Worldwide, Inc., and has a majority stake in Southern Air Holdings, Inc. Together, they operate the world's largest fleet of Boeing 747 freighter aircraft and provide a broad range of Boeing 747, 777, 767, and 737 aircraft for domestic, regional, and international cargo and passenger operations.
